name: Talniflumate
description: Talniflumate, an anti-inflammatory molecule used as a mucoregulator for the treatment of cystic fibrosis, chronic obstructive pulmonary disease and asthma.
indication: For the treatment of cystic fibrosis.

interactions.name: Ketorolac
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Talniflumate is combined with Ketorolac.
